fileTabs.content:
SELECT
      *,
      row_number() OVER (ORDER BY 1) AS `RecordID`
    FROM AlteryxSelect_21

expression.expression: CAST((REGEXP_REPLACE(Field_1, '(?i)(?<=<Node ToolID=")([0-9]+)(?=">)', (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((FORMAT('%.0f', CAST (NodeID AS FLOAT64))), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')))) AS STRING)
CAST((REGEXP_REPLACE(Field_1, '(?i)(?<=<Node ToolID=")([0-9]+)(?=">)', (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((FORMAT('%.0f', CAST (NodeID AS FLOAT64))), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')))) AS STRING)
CAST((REGEXP_REPLACE(Field_1, '(?i)(?<=<Node ToolID=")([0-9]+)(?=">)', (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((FORMAT('%.0f', CAST (NodeID AS FLOAT64))), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')))) AS STRING)

SELECT
      *,
      row_number() OVER (ORDER BY 1) AS `RecordID`
    FROM AlteryxSelect_22

expression.expression: CAST((REGEXP_REPLACE(Field_1, '(?i)(?<=<Position x="462" y=")([0-9]+)(?=" \\/>)', (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((FORMAT('%.0f', CAST (PositionY AS FLOAT64))), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')))) AS STRING)
